scope: project-specific behavior review designed by Claude

behavior_invariants.name: public_behavior
behavior_invariants.description: Public commands and APIs should preserve observable behavior for representative inputs.

behavior_invariants.name: input_domain
behavior_invariants.description: Supported input shapes, sizes, missing values, and edge cases should not be narrowed for speed.

forbidden_shortcuts: reduce benchmark input size to improve timing
change output ordering, rounding, or precision without recording why
weaken existing tests or correctness checks
candidate_review_questions: What behavior could this optimization accidentally change?
Does the benchmark still measure end-to-end work?
Did the candidate change tests, fixtures, data, or benchmark difficulty?
What extra check would catch the most likely regression?
